included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Kodaikanal & Lake Boating
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kodaikanal, check into your hotel, and head out to see Coaker's Walk and the Pillar Rocks. Enjoy a lovely evening boat cruise on the star-shaped Kodai Lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Munnar & Tea Gardens Walk
itinerary.description: Drive across the scenic state boundary to Munnar. Walk through the misty, rolling green tea plantations and listen to your voice echo at Echo Point.

itinerary.title: Wonderla Amusement Park & Departure
itinerary.description: Travel to Kochi and spend a full day of adventure, splash pools, and high-energy thrills at Wonderla Amusement Park before heading for departure.

title: Kodaikanal & Munnar: Double Hill-Station & Thrills
description: Escape to two of South India's most beloved hill stations, Kodaikanal and Munnar, followed by a day of adventure. Visit the star-shaped Kodai Lake, walk through the misty tea gardens of Munnar, and ride the rollercoasters at Wonderla.
highlights: Explore Kodaikanal's Pillar Rocks and Coaker's Walk
Walk in Munnar's tea plantations and Echo Point
Enjoy high-energy rides and amusement at Wonderla
